stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Considering the NACA 6 series aerofoils shown, which of the following statements is true?

options.a: NACA 65-415 is best suited to high speed flight due to high thickness.
options.b: NACA 63-415 is an appropriate aerofoil for transonic and supersonic flight due to high camber and thickness.
options.c: NACA 63-206 is ideal for high speed flight due to reduced shockwave intensity, improved specific range and high altitude characteristics
options.d: NACA 63-206 is best suited for low-speed subsonic flight.
